description_long: This modern bungalow features a boxy, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily finished in smooth gray concrete or stucco, complemented by wooden accents on the porch and stairway. The property is surrounded by a low wooden fence and includes a spacious green lawn, a large tree, and a rectangular swimming pool with a ladder. Outdoor amenities include a covered patio area with seating and a dining table, as well as a garage and multiple entryways. The windows are large and asymmetrically arranged, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and functional, contemporary architecture.
description: A modern, boxy bungalow with a flat roof, gray exterior, wooden accents, a pool, and spacious green yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, covered patio, pool, and a large tree with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, lawn, tree, and the asymmetrical window arrangement on the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage doors, main entrance, and minimal landscaping with two small trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the exterior staircase, pool, and additional lawn space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and front windows
